name: Pete Davidson
bio: Pete Davidson is an American comedian, actor, and writer who became one of the longest-serving Saturday Night Live cast members, joining in 2014 at age twenty. His stand-up draws on his Staten Island roots, mental health, and personal life, often with disarming candor. His specials include Alive from New York and Turbo Fonzarelli.

timeline.ev: Joins Saturday Night Live as a cast member
Netflix special Alive from New York released

accolades: Eight seasons as a Saturday Night Live cast member
One of the youngest performers ever cast on SNL
Three stand-up specials: SMD, Alive from New York, Turbo Fonzarelli

bits.t: Weekend Update: On R. Kelly and Michael Jackson
Weekend Update: On the Met Gala
